summary: iProov exposes two HTTP integration surfaces—a regional REST API authenticated either by service-provider `api_key`+`secret` in the request body or OAuth-based Basic/Bearer credentials from iPortal, and an OIDC Web surface at `api.eu.iproov.id/oidc/v1` authenticated with registered OIDC client credentials via client secret, private_key_jwt, or mTLS/public-client PKCE modes.
